name: Whipped Tallow Balm
description: A sebum-mimicking moisturizer made from grass-fed beef tallow, providing fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, K in a fatty acid profile nearly identical to human skin oils.
replaces: Face cream, lotion, hand cream, lip balm ($10–40 each)
effectivenessNote: Equal/superior to commercial moisturizers. Sebum-mimicking composition gives inherent advantage. -1 only because commercial products sometimes include targeted actives (retinol, HA).
warnings: Must source grass-fed tallow (toxins concentrate in conventional fat)
Faint beefy smell if not purified
Not vegan — no plant equivalent matches sebum this closely
scienceNote: Human sebum: ~41% oleic, ~25% palmitic. Tallow: ~45% oleic, ~25% palmitic. Near-identical = efficient absorption. Commercial lotions use synthetic emulsifiers to approximate what tallow does naturally.
